title: angelica refracta var. yabeana
intro: Angelica refracta var. yabeana, also known as Yabe's angelica, is a lesser-known variety of the Angelica plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family native to Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Yabe's angelica include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Yabe's angelica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, making it a versatile herbal remedy that can be used to promote overall well-being.
